description: Fix the broken Matomo tracking code in the 'Summer Sale' landing page at `~/Documents/landing_page.html`. The marketing team reports that no data is appearing because the code was copied from an old demo. Update the tracking code to use the local Matomo instance (`http://localhost/`) with Site ID `1`. Enable Page View Tracking and add a Heartbeat Timer set to 10 seconds (`_paq.push(['enableHeartBeatTimer', 10]);`). Verify the implementation by opening the file in Firefox (`file:///home/ga/Documents/landing_page.html`) for at least 15 seconds to ensure the visit for 'Summer Sale Landing Page' is recorded in the Matomo database.
